_comment: Declarative workflow definition for teacher-core (routing hub). teacher-core classifies the request, dispatches to exactly one capability skill, and applies the quality gate to the assembled output. For bundles of artifacts, it orchestrates a multi-skill sequence per references/workflows.md.
description: Hub: classify intent, dispatch to the right capability skill, quality-gate the assembled output

steps.condition: when meeting-related language detected in request

steps.note: Route per references/routing-map.md. One skill per request; orchestrate a sequence for bundles.

note: teacher-core is a dispatcher, not a producer. It never authors artifacts directly — it routes and governs.
